Shipping Timeline &nbsp; &nbsp; Orders are processed within 24 hours of placement. &nbsp; &nbsp; Please note: Orders are not processed on Sundays or National Holidays. - [Refund and Returns Policy](https://veloriavault.com/refund_returns/): Overview Our refund and returns policy lasts 7 days. If 7 days have passed since your purchase, we can’t offer you a full refund or exchange. To be eligible for a return, your item must be unused and in the same condition that you received it. It must also be in the original packaging. Several types of goods are exempt from being returned. Perishable goods such as food, flowers, newspapers or magazines cannot be returned. We also do not accept products that are intimate or sanitary goods, hazardous materials, or flammable liquids or gases. Additional non-returnable items: Gift cards Downloadable

- [Warranty Policy](https://veloriavault.com/warranty-policy/): At Veloria Vault, we design our handbags to last for years, both in style and in strength. To support that promise, every Veloria Vault bag is covered by our Lifetime Service Warranty. What Our Warranty Covers Manufacturing Defects: Issues like stitching faults, edge paint flaws, or handle and strap breakage. Hardware Malfunctions: Defects or breakage in locks, hooks, or other metal fittings. If your bag requires service due to a manufacturing defect, we’ll repair it at no additional cost. What Our Warranty Does Not Cover Scratches, plating wear, or damage caused by improper use.Normal signs of leather ageing such as:
- [About](https://veloriavault.com/about/): About Our collections reflect a commitment to luxury that endures—they are statements of elegance, strength, and individuality Our Story Timeless Craftmanship Where Our Journey Began After studying at leather institute and working in the fashion and export industry I took a break to focus on my family But even during that time, my eye never left the world of leather. I kept researching observing and studying the evolution of style, materials and global trends. Veloria vault was born from years of experience in design, fashion and export. We saw a gap between quality and style between tradition and modern life
